Backup current database\ncp mnemosyne.db mnemosyne-pre-upgrade.db\n\n# 2. Upgrade package\npip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\n\n# 3. Verify (schema migrations run automatically on first connection)\npython -c \"from mnemosyne import Memory; m = Memory(); print(m.stats())\"\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Automatic Migrations"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses automatic schema migrations that run on first connection after an upgrade. There is no ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python -m mnemosyne.migrate"}]," command. If migration fails, check logs with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LOG_LEVEL=debug"}],"."]}]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Schema Migrations"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne uses automatic schema migrations:"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Version"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Migration"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"1.0 → 2.0"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"m_1_0_to_2_0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Add semantic memory, FTS5 indices"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2.0 → 2.1"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"m_2_0_to_2_1"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Add session_id to episodic"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2.1 → 2.2"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"m_2_1_to_2_2"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Add temporal graph indexes"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Migrations run automatically on first connection. No manual intervention needed."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Cross-Instance Migration"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Export from old instance, import to new using the Python SDK:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\n# Export from old database\nold_mem = Memory(db_path=\"old.db\")\nold_mem.export_to_file(\"export.json\")\n\n# Import into new database\nnew_mem = Memory(db_path=\"new.db\")\nnew_mem.import_from_file(\"export.json\")\n\n# Verify\nprint(new_mem.stats())\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Export Formats"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Format"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Use Case"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Size"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"JSON"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Human-readable, version control"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Large"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Fast, preserves all metadata"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Compact"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Legacy Migration"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"For migrating from pre-2.0 data formats, use the migration script:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"python scripts/migrate_from_legacy.py --db mnemosyne.db\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Rollback"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"If upgrade fails:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Stop application\n# Restore pre-upgrade backup\ncp mnemosyne-pre-upgrade.db mnemosyne.db\n\n# Downgrade package\npip install mnemosyne-memory==1.0.0\n\n# Restart\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":"$L5"}]],["$L6"],"$L7"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"w2V6K6EKWmEvKvxCYnnRM"}
